arts.ttl: Newcastle Want to Sign 'One of the Biggest Talents in South America'
arts.sum: Newcastle are eager to sign Brazil talent Rayan, who has been compared to Adriano, for Eddie Howe.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sent scouts to watch “quality player” on Tottenham & Newcastle radar yesterday
arts.sum: Liverpool are looking to improve their attacking unit, and they are keeping tabs on the Ipswich Town striker, Liam Delap. Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United are keen on the player as well. According to a report from TBR Football, all three clubs sent scouts to watch the 22-year-old striker in action on Saturday. Delap has […] The post Liverpool sent scouts to watch “quality player” on Tottenham & Newcastle radar yesterday appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Jordan Pickford makes 10-word admission about Newcastle United crowd after Sunderland taunts
arts.sum: Pickford touched upon that noise as the 31-year-old discussed what it was like to play at Villa Park, Anfield, Old Trafford and, of course, St James'. Just growing up as a kid, we didn't have Sky back in the day and we watched Champions League nights so I always liked playing at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss blasts 'unfair' schedule as Newcastle United rivals lose Champions League ground
arts.sum: The Blues boss opted to start Cole Palmer on the bench following their win over Tottenham on Thursday night, with Thomas Frank's side have a day extra to prepare after their 2-1 defeat at Newcastle United . We played a demanding game Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Ruthless Newcastle United have Champions League message to send at Leicester
arts.sum: We are used with clubs sniffing round for United's top performers such as Alexander Isak, Anthony Gordon and Bruno. We've just pulled off a masterstroke by negotiating a £20m fee for Kelly who was signed on a free transfer and had struggled badly early season but Juve think we might gratefully take him back in part exchange for an absolute thoroughbred.

arts.ttl: Peter Crouch slaps down Jamie O'Hara after 'embarrassing' Newcastle United claim
arts.sum: Peter Crouch has suggested that the Carabao Cup 'carries more weight now' after Newcastle United joyously celebrated ending a 70-year wait to win a major domestic trophy. In fact, Peter Crouch could not have disagreed with O'Hara more after his ex-team-mate described the scenes as 'embarrassing'.

arts.ttl: Player Newcastle want to sign now officially has a release clause after relegation confirmed with 3-1 defeat
Alan Shearer makes big Newcastle United transfer claim - 'Five players out the door' - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has predicted that up to five long-serving Newcastle United players could be 'out the door' this summer. Eddie Howe admitted that Sean Longstaff's long-term future was 'unclear' just a few days ago and the midfielder is not the only player who faces an uncertain summer.

arts.ttl: Newcastle's huge stadium boost after what Man U owner Jim Ratcliffe was given
arts.sum: Chancellor Rachel Reeves, after all, has championed the Old Trafford regeneration project as 'a shining example' of the government's plans for economic growth while Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe revealed Labour are 'enthusiastic to get going quickly'. As part of the wider regeneration of the Old Trafford area, the club have suggested the project could create 92,000 new jobs, lead to 17,000 homes being built, bring another 1.8 million visitors to the area annually and generate an additional £7.3bn per year to the UK economy.
